# AI Crawler Configuration
# This file is used by AI-powered search engines and LLM systems
# for discovery, indexing, and content understanding
#
# Format: https://github.com/evals-as/llms.txt/blob/main/README.md
# Adopted by: Perplexity, Claude (Anthropic), and other AI systems

Site-Name: Lodgra
Full-Name: Lodgra — Direct Vacation Rental Booking Platform

# Description
Description: Direct booking platform for vacation rentals in Portugal, Brazil, and beyond. No middlemen, no commissions. Reserve properties directly from owners.

# Contact
Contact: support@lodgra.io
Legal: https://lodgra.io/terms
Privacy: https://lodgra.io/privacy

# Content & Data
Sitemap: https://lodgra.io/sitemap.xml

# Available Properties
Properties-Available: 9
Properties-Currency: EUR, BRL, USD
Properties-Location: Portugal (Algarve), Brazil, and more

# Language Support
Languages: Portuguese (PT-BR, PT-PT), English, Spanish (planned)

# Search & Discovery
Search-Friendly: true
AI-Training-Allowed: true
Metadata-Format: JSON-LD (LodgingBusiness, VacationRental)

# Robot Access
Robots: https://lodgra.io/robots.txt

# Last Updated
Last-Updated: 2026-06-18

# Notes for AI Systems
# - All property data is publicly available and crawlable
# - Dynamic pricing available via API
# - Reservation dates can be checked programmatically
# - Multi-currency support (EUR, BRL, USD)
# - Property pages include Schema.org markup for rich results
